title: Validate UI loading state and button disabling during form submission
description: Test the user experience by ensuring that form submission buttons are disabled and a loading indicator is shown during API calls.
preconditions: User is on the login or registration page

steps.description: 1. Fill out the login form with valid credentials
3. Immediately after clicking, try to click the 'Login' button again

expected_result: As soon as the 'Login' button is clicked, it becomes disabled, and a visual loading indicator (e.g., a spinner) appears. The button remains disabled until the API call completes, preventing duplicate submissions.
